setting.help: How booking verification codes are delivered to customers. Choose "Email only" while no SMS gateway (e.g. Twilio) is active.
setting.title: Verification Code Delivery Channel

setting.help: Lifetime of verification codes — shown in the SMS/email copy and drives the countdown.
setting.title: Verification code lifetime (minutes)

setting.help: Minimum wait between two codes for the same booking. 0 disables.
setting.title: Resend cooldown (seconds)

setting.help: Maximum codes per hour for one phone/email across all bookings (abuse protection). Keep aligned across websites.
setting.title: Codes per hour per contact

setting.help: Unpaid draft bookings older than this many hours are automatically expired.
setting.title: Auto-expire stale bookings after (hours)
